LAW AND MOTION, 302, THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AT THE CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENTS, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT JOHN SCHUBBE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, AND ALTERNATIVE MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION, IS DENIED IN ITS ENTIRETY. DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN TO SHOW THAT PLAINTIFF'S DEATH WAS NOT CAUSED BY THE ACCIDENT BUT PLAINTIFF HAS RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE. (PLAINTIFF'S SSUMF NO. 84, BERGER DECL. 28 AND DREW DECL. 28.) PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS TO EVIDENCE NOS. 1 AND 2 AND ALL OF DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS TO EVIDENCE ARE OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS TO EVIDENCE NOS. 3 AND 4 AND PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS TO THE EVIDENCE SUBMITTED WITH DEFENDANT'S REPLY BRIEF ARE SUSTAINED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER COMPLIANT WITH CCP 437C(G). JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR # 7077.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-23-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-25-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Omtion To Compel Further Answers To Requests For Admissions And For Sanctions; Memo Of P&A
Off Calendar Mar-18-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. PLAINTIFF SAKKAR AZIZUDDIN's Motion To Compel Further Answers To Requests For Admissions is Granted. Within 20 days, Defendant shall serve verified further responses. Defendant's blanket objection on the grounds of expert opinion is not proper. Monetary sanctions are denied. The Court signed the order that was emailed to the court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Notice Of Motion And Omtion To Compel Further Answers To Requests For Admissions And For Sanctions; Memo Of P&A
Off Calendar Mar-04-2013 Continued To Mar-18-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Michael E. Schwimmer, Olan Law, 310.600.8700, appearing for Plaintiff;
Colin H. Jewell, Cholakian & Associates, 650.871.9544, appearing for the Defendant.

There being no stipulation to the Judge Pro Tem, the matter is A R G U E D and PLAINTIFF SAKKAR AZIZUDDIN'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Answers To Requests For Admissions And For Sanctions is continued to March 18, 2013 at 9:30 am in Department 302.
Katherine Huibonhoa, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =(302/JPT)

Defendant John Schubbe'S Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-19-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Colin H. Jewell, Esq. of Cholakian & Associates, Tel. 650.871.9544, for defendant and moving party;
Michael E. Schwimer, Esq. of Olan Law, Tel. 310.600.8700, for plaintiff and opposing party.

The matter was argued. At the conclusion of arguments, the court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant John Schubbe'S Motion For Summary Judgment, and alternative Motion For Summary Adjudication, is denied in its entirety. Defendant shifted the burden to show that Plaintiff's death was not caused by the accident but Plaintiff has raised a triable issue. (Plaintiff's SSUMF No. 84, Berger Decl. 28 and Drew Decl. 28.) Plaintiff's Objections to Evidence Nos. 1 and 2 and all of Defendant's Objections to Evidence are overruled. Plaintiff's Objections to Evidence Nos. 3 and 4 and Plaintiff's objections to the evidence submitted with defendant's reply brief are sustained. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order compliant with CCP 437c(g). Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-20-2012 Continued To Apr-22-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Defendant John Schubbe'S Motion For Summary Judgment
